strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and multiple languages
Direct AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at re:cinq, matching the JD requirement
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, Vitest-era tooling, workshops on testing)
concerns: Limited explicit Nest.js exposure in listed stack

response.justification: Candidate brings deep, long-tenured full-stack experience squarely in the JD's primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) with recent, directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling work. Engineering craftsmanship, testing discipline, and architecture exposure are well-evidenced. Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js and dated Kotlin/Java, plus a recent career gap to clarify, but overall profile aligns strongly with the role.
